properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v5 v5 v5 v6 v7 v5 v5 v5 v8 v5 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You are always fighting for us Heaven's angels all around My delight is found in knowing That You wear the Victor's crown You're my help and my defender You're my Savior and my friend By Your grace I live and breathe to worship You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: At the mention of Your greatness In Your Name I will bow down In Your presence fear is silent For You wear the Victor's crown Let Your glory fill this temple Let Your power overflow By Your grace I live and breathe to worship You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Hallelujah You have overcome You have overcome Hallelujah Jesus, You have overcome the world

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You are ever interceding As the lost become the found You can never be defeated For You wear the Victor's crown You are Jesus the Messiah You're the Hope of all the world By Your grace I live and breathe to worship You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Every high thing must come down Every stronghold shall be broken You wear the Victor's crown You have overcome, You have overcome

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: At the cross the work was finished You were buried in the ground But the grave could not contain You For You wear the Victor's crown

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Hallelujah You have overcome You have overcome Hallelujah Jesus, You have overcome

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Every high thing must come down Every stronghold shall be broken You wear the Victor's crown You have overcome
